# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security hardening

## Testing

List the commands you ran:

```bash
npm run build
npm run lint
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I made a focused, reviewable change.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `.env` files, logs, Redis dumps, or user data.
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior changed.
- [ ] I reviewed the project safety and beta-status wording if relevant.
